name: c60_fixed
title: Mixture model
description:
Empirically derived mixture model where different components have different equilibrium frequencies to account for site-specific biochemical constraints. It partitions protein alignment sites into 60 distinct profile classes, each with a unique amino acid distribution, to better approximate the varying selective pressures across a sequence.
This site-heterogeneous approach effectively mitigates long-branch attraction and systematic biases that often compromise simpler, single-matrix models like LG or WAG.
This version fixes the relative frequencies of the 60 components to the values from the paper.

journal.name: Philosophical Transactions of the Royal Society B: Biological Sciences
